Notice Of Motion And Motion For Finding Substantial Compliance With Contractors State License Law
Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ATKINSON CONTRACTORS LP, WALSH CONSTRUCTION CO, ATKINSON/WALSH JOINT VENTURE's Motion For Finding Substantial Compliance With Contractors State License Law.

Off Calendar. The case was dismissed on December 28, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
